tasks.title: Sum of Even Numbers
tasks.description: Write a program that reads an integer $N$ from the user and calculates the sum of all even integers from 1 up to and including $N$ using a `for` loop.

tasks.title: Sum of Digits
tasks.description: Write a program that takes a positive integer as input and calculates the sum of its digits using a `while` loop. For example, if the input is 123, the output should be 6 (1+2+3).
